summary: Strong performance highlighted by a memorable Box of Rain return and a superb Visions of Johanna cover, though recording details remain unclear.
review: Fans rave about the show’s musical moments – the unexpected Box of Rain comeback is called “on par with the ’89 Dark Star,” and Jerry’s rendition of Dylan’s Visions of Johanna earns high praise. No specific comments address the source or fidelity of the audio, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about two standout songs suggest a good show, but lack of information on recording quality and only two brief reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his faithful and compelling cover of Dylan’s Visions of Johanna.
